dialogues.text: You know how to read these. Look. 4 symbols. Each one means 5 books. How many books altogether?
20 books. You skip-counted by 5s. 5, 10, 15, 20. You've been doing this all unit.
Wait. Look at what those symbols were hiding.
4 symbols. Each symbol held 5 items. That's 4 groups of 5. Look familiar? This is called MULTIPLICATION. You've been doing multiplication this whole time.
4 groups. And remember? 5 in each group. That's 4 groups of 5. And guess what? There's a symbol for that: 4 × 5.
Here's a different picture. No graph. Just bags.
3 bags. That's 3 groups of 4. Same idea—bags instead of graph symbols.
You found equal groups in graphs. You found them in bags. There's a whole lot more hiding. Let's find them.
